title: linzia nigritiana
intro: Linzia nigritiana, also known as Kibo or African wormwood, is a plant species native to East Africa, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to repel mosquitoes and other insects, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linzia nigritiana include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions, as well as its use as an antimalarial agent. Herbal preparations of Linzia nigritiana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various illnesses.
